entry.title: New: CR 25-9 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 22 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, to: 1) amend Section 2, Estimated Revenues, by increasing Carryover/Savings from the General Fund by $40,000; 2) amend Section 3.B.12.a.(4), Office of the Mayor, Administration Program, by increasing the appropriation for Grant to Akakū: Maui Community Television by $40,000; and 3) adjust the totals accordingly.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
